_comment: Manual test cases for the Price Tier Predictor (Rails form + POST /predict). expected_tier is the label a human would expect from product positioning; the trained model may differ slightly.

training_price_thresholds_reference.currency_note: Mixed sources (Flipkart ₹ / Amazon $); values are from ml/data/processed/thresholds.json — use as rough tier boundaries for price hints only.

input.title: Basic Wired Earbuds with Mic
input.description: Simple in-ear headphones for calls and music. No-frills packaging. Great for students.

cases.rationale: Entry-level wording, low implied price, mass-market category.

input.title: Clear TPU Phone Case for Budget Android
input.description: Thin protective cover. Value pack. Fits most generic smartphones.

cases.rationale: Accessory positioned as cheap/value; high review count still compatible with budget volume sellers.

input.title: Motorola Moto G Power 128GB Unlocked
input.description: Solid mid-range phone with two-day battery, 50MP camera, clean Android experience. Good balance of features and price.

cases.rationale: Explicit mid-range positioning; price near typical p50 band in training thresholds.

input.title: 15-inch Laptop 8GB RAM 256GB SSD Windows 11
input.description: Everyday home and office laptop for browsing, video calls, and documents. Reliable mainstream performance.

cases.rationale: Mainstream consumer laptop tier; moderate specs.

input.title: Sony Alpha a6400 Mirrorless Camera with 16-50mm Lens
input.description: APS-C sensor, 4K video, fast autofocus for enthusiasts and content creators stepping up from smartphones.

cases.rationale: Enthusiast camera brand and specs; price above p75 in reference thresholds.

input.title: iPad Air 256GB WiFi 11-inch
input.description: M-series chip, Liquid Retina display, Apple Pencil support. Pro features without flagship Pro pricing.

cases.rationale: Premium brand and tier naming; high rating and review volume.

input.title: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra 512GB Titanium Black
input.description: Flagship smartphone with 200MP camera, S Pen, 5000 mAh battery, AI photo editing, brightest display in the lineup.

cases.rationale: Ultra/flagship naming, top-tier specs; README API example aligns with luxury positioning.

input.title: Rolex Submariner Date Stainless Steel 41mm
input.description: Iconic Swiss dive watch, certified chronometer, luxury retail with waiting list at authorised dealers.

cases.rationale: Ultra-premium luxury product category and price point.

input.title: Refurbished iPhone SE 64GB — scratched screen
input.description: Older generation Apple phone sold as budget refurb. Battery health 78%. Cosmetic wear.

cases.rationale: Conflicting signals (Apple vs refurb/budget); model may split between mid-range and budget — good edge case.
